tasks.task: Explore plugin structure — understand how agents, skills, commands, and plugin.json work together
tasks.notes: Fully explored. Skills at plugins/command-module/skills/, agents at agents/<category>/. Plugin discovered via .claude-plugin/plugin.json. Marketplace wraps the plugin with marketplace.json. Root-level symlinks added for Cursor compatibility.

tasks.task: Strip Ruby/Rails and team-scale review agents — remove everything not relevant to a solo Python/JS operator
tasks.notes: Completed in prior session. Commit 02d310f: refactor: fork as command-module, strip Rails/Every/enterprise components.

tasks.task: Decide whether to keep the marketplace wrapper or extract just the plugin contents
tasks.notes: Decision: keep marketplace wrapper (needed for CLI and multi-plugin support) but add root-level plugin.json + symlinks (skills/, agents/) so Cursor can discover the plugin directly. Both paths now work.

tasks.task: Point Claude Code at local command-module instead of the upstream compound-engineering plugin
tasks.notes: Done. Plugin installed via Cursor Manage Plugins using GitHub URL. marketplace.json needed owner field for schema validation. Old every-marketplace and compound-engineering cache cleaned up. Plugin now loads across all repos.

stripped-and-running.description: Command-module trimmed to essentials and loaded as active plugin replacing compound-engineering
